sections.paragraph:
verb לפתוח

to open; turn on; untie; unroll; begin, start

verb להיפתח

be opened; untied; started

verb לפתח (>>פתח)

to develop, improve; engrave; untie

verb פותח

be developed; be engraved

verb להתפתח

to develop, grow

masculine noun

aperture, vent, mouth, foramen, window, plughole, meatus, orifice, ostium; opening, entrance, doorway, gate, portal

masculine noun

patach (vowel sign)

masculine noun

Fatah
